description: From the manufacturer Crayola Markers The creative possibilities of a pack of markers in an artist’s hands are endless! Made to encourage imaginative expression, our markers feature classic Crayola colours with high-quality, vibrant ink. From a practical standpoint, our markers include a sturdy tip to ensure they’ll work just as well on the twentieth art project as they did on the first. Crayola coloured markers are available in a diverse range of options, such as broad line, fine line, glitter, metallic, and more. For the littlest artists, we offer washable markers, which help make cleanup a snap! For the classroom, we also sell markers in bulk packs.
